title: CV Builder
shortDescription: Build a professional two-column CV with a live preview and print it as a PDF.

title: Markdown Editor
shortDescription: Write and preview Markdown in the portfolio's pop art style. Open, edit, and download .md files.

title: JSON Formatter
shortDescription: Prettify, minify, and explore JSON with a collapsible tree view.

title: Cyberpunk Red Generator
shortDescription: Random encounter, NPC, loot, and location generators for Cyberpunk Red TTRPG sessions.

title: CPR Rules Reference
shortDescription: Searchable wiki of Cyberpunk Red core mechanics. Stats, skills, combat, netrunning, and more.

title: Diff Checker
shortDescription: Compare two texts side-by-side and see differences highlighted line-by-line.

title: CSS Style Explorer
shortDescription: Explore design movements from Pop Art to Cyberpunk. Pick a preset, tweak every property, copy the CSS.

title: Image Tagger
shortDescription: Tag and organize images with custom labels. Local repo — coming soon.

title: Sprite Selector
shortDescription: Select and extract sprites from sprite sheets. Local repo — coming soon.

title: TTRPG Map Maker
shortDescription: Grid-based map builder for tabletop RPG sessions. Local repo — coming soon.
